headline: Delta-Chain Implementation Plan v3
orientation: Version 3 of the Knowledge Pyramid implementation plan supersedes prior drafts, incorporates two full audit cycles (8 auditors, 2 cycles) and validates the architecture. It outlines the existing codebase, enumerates critical partner‑seam bugs, defines a phased roadmap (bug fixes, tool‑call handling, annotation API, delta‑chain core, web‑edge graph, progressive crystallization, YAML configuration, meta‑analysis layers, frontend integration), specifies model selections and fallback logic, presents a detailed cost model with monitoring, lists concrete success criteria, and sketches future extensions (L2.5 grouping, deferred features).

topics.current: Supersedes `delta-chain-implementation-plan.md` (v1, 840 lines) and `-2`. Audit basis: Stage 1 (2026‑03‑22) applied 4 critical, 12 major, ~10 minor findings; Stage 2 deep audit by 8 auditors added further corrections. Architecture now deemed structurally sound.
topics.name: Audit and Versioning
topics.summary: v3 incorporates two audit cycles and validates architecture.

topics.current: Agent‑wire‑node contains 9 Rust pyramid modules (db.rs, types.rs, query.rs, ingest.rs, build.rs, slug.rs, llm.rs, routes.rs, mod.rs) and 4 partner modules (mod.rs, context.rs, conversation.rs, routes.rs). Admin UI (React/Tauri) has 5 components. 18 pyramid + 5 partner HTTP endpoints are live. Dennis can respond via nav skeleton + pyramid brain but tool calls fail due to OpenRouter format. Known partner seam bugs (BrainState mismatch, API path params, PartnerResponse alignment, DennisState serialization, UTF‑8 panic, duplicate node conversion, unbounded session cache, duplicate auth middleware). Vibesmithy provides Space view, chat UI, and 18+5 API functions. Databases: `pyramid.db` (slugs mainclaudeconversation 1164 nodes, agent‑wire‑node 137, docs 150, mega‑project 2735) and `partner.db` (sessions table).
topics.name: Current System State
topics.summary: Agent‑wire‑node and vibesmithy are built; partner seams buggy.

topics.current: Eight bugs identified: 1) BrainState enum mismatch; 2) API route path vs query param inconsistency; 3) PartnerResponse JSON shape mismatch; 4) DennisState non‑serializable fields; 5) UTF‑8 unsafe slicing in `assemble_context_window`; 6) Duplicate node conversion functions (`node_from_row` vs `row_to_node`); 7) Unbounded session cache (needs LRU/expiry); 8) Duplicate auth middleware. Approach: edit each file, test via curl or vibesmithy, no architectural changes. Estimated effort 4‑6 h.
topics.name: Phase 0 – Partner Seam Bug Fixes
topics.summary: Immediate fixes to unblock real‑world testing.

topics.current: Dennis emits `<pyramid_query>` tags instead of proper tool calls. Root cause: model (`anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514` or `xiaomi/mimo-v2-pro`) may not support OpenRouter function‑calling format; missing `tool_choice:"auto"`. Fix options: A) add `tool_choice:"auto"` to request payload (preferred); B) parse inline tool tags from content; C) switch to a model with native support (e.g., `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514`, `openai/gpt-4o`, `google/gemini-2.5-flash`). Verification via curl POST to `/partner/message`. Estimated effort 2‑4 h.
topics.name: Phase 1 – Dennis Tool Execution Fix

topics.current: Create `pyramid_annotations` table with fields (id, slug, node_id, annotation_type, payload, context_question, context_source, created_at) and indexes. Define payload JSON for types: correction, note, connection, tag, faq. Add HTTP endpoints: POST `/pyramid/:slug/annotate`, GET `/pyramid/:slug/annotations` (filterable by node_id, type, source, question). Merge annotation results into existing query endpoints (`/corrections`, `/entities`, node detail). FAQ edge meta‑process creates/updates FAQ nodes from corrections/notes. Implement Rust structs (`Annotation`, `AnnotationType`) and DB functions (`insert_annotation`, `get_annotations`). Integrate prompt‑write‑back block into all skill prompts. Estimated effort 4‑6 h.
topics.name: Phase 1.5 – Annotation API
topics.summary: Add persistent annotation layer for auditors and agents.

topics.current: Add `pyramid_threads` table (slug, thread_id, thread_name, current_canonical_id, depth, delta_count, timestamps). Migration: add `superseded_by` column to `pyramid_nodes`, populate `pyramid_threads` from existing L2+ nodes. Create `live_pyramid_nodes` view filtering out superseded nodes. New Rust module `delta.rs` defines structs `Delta`, `DeltaRelevance`, `DeltaFlag`, `CumulativeDistillation`, `WebEdgeNote`, `CollapseEvent`. Database tables: `pyramid_deltas`, `pyramid_distillations`, `pyramid_collapse_events` with indexes. Core functions: `create_delta` (transaction‑wrapped sequence), `rewrite_distillation` (drift check, token budget, web edge notes), `needs_collapse`, `collapse_thread`, `propagate_staleness`. Tier‑1 regex extraction (`entity`, `correction`, `decision`) runs zero‑cost before any LLM call. Thread matching/creation logic uses LLM prompt `DELTA_PROMPT` (relevance JSON) and `DISTILLATION_REWRITE_PROMPT` (structured output, web edge notes). `COLLAPSE_PROMPT` produces canonical node JSON. Estimated effort 2‑3 days.
topics.name: Phase 2 – Delta‑Chain Core System
topics.summary: Introduce stable thread identity, delta creation, distillation, and collapse.

topics.current: Add Rust module `webbing.rs` with structs `WebEdge` and `WebEdgeDelta`. Database tables `pyramid_web_edges` (bidirectional constraint `thread_a_id < thread_b_id`, relevance_score, max 10 edges per thread) and `pyramid_web_edge_deltas`. Edge creation normalizes thread pair, enforces max edges, creates delta, rewrites edge distillation, resets relevance_score to 1.0. Relevance decays by 0.05 each cycle without reinforcement; edges below 0.2 are pruned during crystallization. Estimated effort 1 day.
topics.name: Phase 3 – Intelligent Webbing
topics.summary: Model cross‑thread relationships as web edges.

topics.current: Declare `pub mod warm; pub mod crystal;` in `partner/mod.rs`. Warm pass (`warm.rs`) runs every ~100 conversation lines: extracts Tier‑1 entities, builds provisional L0/L1 nodes, feeds topics to delta chain, updates `warm_cursor`. Concurrency fix: clone session, merge back via mutex; guard with per‑session semaphore. Session idle timer uses `tokio_util::sync::CancellationToken` stored in `PartnerState`; fires after 5 min of inactivity to run `crystal::crystallize`. Crystallization (`crystal.rs`) promotes warm nodes (build_version = 1), checks collapse thresholds, runs collapses, propagates staleness upward, decays unreinforced web edges, updates nav skeleton cache. Update `assemble_context_window` to include active thread tips, cumulative distillations, and web edges. Estimated effort 2‑3 days.
topics.name: Phase 4 – Progressive Crystallization
topics.summary: Warm‑pass, idle timer, and crystallization pipeline.

topics.current: Add `config.rs` defining `PyramidActionChain` and nested structs (`L0Config`, `L1Config`, `DeltaConfig`, `L2PlusConfig`, `MetaConfig`, `ScalingConfig`). Uses `serde_yaml` dependency. Provide default configs: `conversation_default.yaml`, `code_default.yaml`, `document_default.yaml`, `document_fiction.yaml`. Loading function `load_for_content_type` selects custom file if present, otherwise defaults. Estimated effort 1 day.
topics.name: Phase 5 – YAML Configuration System
topics.summary: Replace hard‑coded values with loadable YAML configs.

topics.current: Add `meta.rs` with async functions `timeline_forward`, `timeline_backward`, `narrative`, `quickstart`. Store each as a special node in `pyramid_nodes` with depth = ‑1 (e.g., `META-timeline-forward`). Deltas fire on thread changes, updating meta nodes. Queries for regular nodes use `live_pyramid_nodes` view; meta queries filter `depth < 0`. Estimated effort 1 day.
topics.name: Phase 6 – Meta‑Analysis Layers
topics.summary: Timeline, narrative, and quickstart nodes built on delta chain.

topics.current: Vibesmithy updates: Space view visual cues for brain state (hydrated, warm, crystal), luminous web edges, delta activity feed component (`DeltaFeed.tsx`), BrainStateBar badges, Dennis avatar states, entity pills linking to Space nodes. New backend endpoints: GET `/pyramid/:slug/threads`, GET `/pyramid/:slug/threads/:thread_id/deltas`, GET `/pyramid/:slug/distillation/:thread_id`, GET `/pyramid/:slug/web-edges`, GET `/pyramid/:slug/meta/*`, POST `/pyramid/:slug/crystallize`, POST/GET annotation endpoints (Phase 1.5). Estimated effort 2‑3 days.
topics.name: Phase 7 – Frontend Integration
topics.summary: UI visualizations and new API endpoints for delta activity.

topics.current: Revised schedule: Phase 0 (4‑6 h) + Phase 1 (2‑4 h) parallel; Phase 1.5 (4‑6 h) standalone; Phase 2 (2‑3 days) core; Phase 3 (1 day) depends on Phase 2; Phase 4 (2‑3 days) depends on Phase 2; Phase 5 (1 day) can run parallel to Phase 4; Phase 6 (1 day) depends on Phase 2; Phase 7 (2‑3 days) depends on all backend phases. Parallelism: Phase 0 + 1, Phase 4 + 5.
topics.name: Build Order and Parallelism

topics.current: Primary model: `inception/mercury-2` (128 K context, ~700 tps, $0.001/call). Fallback 1: `qwen/qwen3.5-flash-02-23` (1 M context, ~170 tps, $0.02/call). Fallback 2: `x-ai/grok-4.20-beta` (2 M context, expensive). Switch after 3 consecutive 5xx responses; log and alert if primary unavailable >10 min. Delta creation & distillation use Mercury‑2; collapses use `xiaomi/mimo-v2-pro`; L2+ clustering and meta passes also use mimo‑v2‑pro; Dennis partner model configurable via `pyramid_config.json` (default `xiaomi/mimo-v2-pro`).
topics.name: Model Configuration and Fallback Logic
topics.summary: Primary and fallback LLMs with health‑check criteria.

topics.current: Operation costs (OpenRouter estimates): Delta creation $0.001‑0.002, Distillation rewrite $0.001‑0.002, Tier‑1 regex $0, Collapse $0.02‑0.05, Web edge delta $0.001, Meta passes $0.02‑0.05. Typical turn $0.003‑0.005; cascade $0.03‑0.05; worst case $0.15‑0.20. `cost_log` table records id, slug, operation, model, input/output tokens, cost, timestamp. Alerts if any operation >2× estimate. Weekly summary queryable via API.
topics.name: Cost Model and Monitoring
topics.summary: Estimated per‑operation costs and logging schema.

topics.current: 1) Dennis holds multi‑hour persistent conversation. 2) Tier‑1 regex fires on every message. 3) Warm pass triggers ~100 lines, creating provisional nodes. 4) Deltas accumulate automatically on L2 threads. 5) New threads auto‑created when content mismatches. 6) Collapses occur when delta count or token budget thresholds hit. 7) Web edges update via distillation rewrites, max 10 per thread, relevance decays. 8) Quickstart regenerates on apex change. 9) Fresh Dennis instance can read quickstart + nav skeleton for full understanding. 10) Space view visualizes warm/crystal/hydrated states. 11) System cost per content chunk $0.003‑0.005, per turn $0.03‑0.05. 12) Cost logs record actual spend. 13) YAML‑driven configuration. 14) Annotations writable by any agent. 15) Staleness propagation terminates (visited set, max depth, debounce).
topics.name: Success Criteria
topics.summary: Concrete measurable goals for a complete system.

topics.current: L2.5 grouping: when >15‑20 L2 threads per slug, introduce intermediate clustering layer. Deferred items: Fiction content type (uses document pipeline with `document_fiction.yaml`), Intelligent user matching (Midnight Protocol), Payment processing for paid tier.
topics.name: Future Work
